reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar, si tenes mascotas es ideal para parar. Los baños excelentemente limpios. Las chicas que atienden super amables.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, ideal if you have pets. The bathrooms are impeccably clean. The staff are incredibly friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxeG9qdTlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena opción para parar un rato a comer algo o estirar las piernas. Hay mesitas, árboles. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop for a bite to eat or stretch your legs. There are tables and trees. The bathrooms are very clean.

reviews.comment:
Especial agradecimiento a la excelente atención recibida por Delvis telefónicamente que nos puso en contacto con la ypf de ruta 2 donde habíamos olvidado nuestra billetera (y no nos podíamos comunicar). Se preocupó y ocupó de que pudiéramos contactarnos y nos hizo saber que allí estaba 🫶🏻🫶🏻 infinitamente gracias!! 😊 😊

(Translated by Google)
Special thanks to Delvis for the excellent customer service over the phone, who connected us with the YPF branch on Route 2, where we'd forgotten our wallet (and couldn't get in touch). He was very attentive and made sure we could get in touch, letting us know it was there. 🫶🏻🫶🏻 Thank you so much!! 😊 😊
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxeE9fX3RBRRAB
